rationale: Section 1-e prohibits state ad valorem taxes; it does not address or constrain residence homestead exemption amounts. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) is governed by art. VIII, §1-b(c), not §1-e.
quote: No State ad valorem taxes shall be levied upon any property within this State.
_note: No conflict. The cited constitutional provision addresses prohibition of state ad valorem taxes, not homestead exemption levels. Homestead exemptions are authorized under Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b(c).
